scripts.limpar-site: tsx -e "import admin from 'firebase-admin'; import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const keys = JSON.parse(readFileSync('./firebase-keys.json', 'utf8')); admin.initializeApp({ credential: admin.credential.cert(keys) }); const db = admin.firestore(); await db.collection('configuracoes').doc('site').delete(); console.log('🗑️ Documento \"site\" deletado com SUCESSO do Firebase!'); process.exit(0);"
